'''âr-v-p''' ('''karavap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forban|forban]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forban|forban]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| karavap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiravap|thiravap]] || [[word:jiravap|jiravap]] || [[word:shiravap|shiravap]] || [[word:kiravap|kiravap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuravap|thuthuravap]] || [[word:jujuravap|jujuravap]] || [[word:shushuravap|shushuravap]] || [[word:kukuravap|kukuravap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuravap|thuravap]] || [[word:juravap|juravap]] || [[word:shuravap|shuravap]] || [[word:kuravap|kuravap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuravap|thuravap]] || [[word:juravap|juravap]] || [[word:shuravap|shuravap]] || [[word:kuravap|kuravap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theravap|theravap]] || [[word:jeravap|jeravap]] || [[word:sheravap|sheravap]] || [[word:keravap|keravap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoravap|thothoravap]] || [[word:jojoravap|jojoravap]] || [[word:shoshoravap|shoshoravap]] || [[word:kokoravap|kokoravap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoravap|thoravap]] || [[word:joravap|joravap]] || [[word:shoravap|shoravap]] || [[word:koravap|koravap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoravap|thoravap]] || [[word:joravap|joravap]] || [[word:shoravap|shoravap]] || [[word:koravap|koravap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠravap|thĂŠravap]] || [[word:jĂŠravap|jĂŠravap]] || [[word:shĂŠravap|shĂŠravap]] || [[word:kĂŠravap|kĂŠravap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharavap|thatharavap]] || [[word:jajaravap|jajaravap]] || [[word:shasharavap|shasharavap]] || [[word:kakaravap|kakaravap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharavap|tharavap]] || [[word:jaravap|jaravap]] || [[word:sharavap|sharavap]] || [[word:karavap|karavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharavap|tharavap]] || [[word:jaravap|jaravap]] || [[word:sharavap|sharavap]] || [[word:karavap|karavap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharavap|sharavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharavap|gosharavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharavap|gokisharavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharavapnĂŒ|sharavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharavapnknĂŒ|gosharavapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharavapnĂŒ|gokisharavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharavapshĂ«|sharavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharavapnkshĂ«|gosharavapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharavapshĂ«|gokisharavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharavapro|sharavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharavapnkro|gosharavapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharavapro|gokisharavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharavapmu|sharavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharavapnkmu|gosharavapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharavapmu|gokisharavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharavapsher|sharavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharavapnksher|gosharavapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharavapsher|gokisharavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharavapng|sharavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharavapnkng|gosharavapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharavapng|gokisharavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharavapya|sharavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharavapnkya|gosharavapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharavapya|gokisharavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharavapyam|sharavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharavapnkyam|gosharavapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharavapyam|gokisharavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharavapnĂŒshĂ«|sharavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharavapnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharavapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharavapnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharavapnĂŒro|sharavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharavapnknĂŒro|gosharavapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharavapnĂŒro|gokisharavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharavapnĂŒmu|sharavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharavapnknĂŒmu|gosharavapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharavapnĂŒmu|gokisharavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharavapshĂ«nĂŒ|sharavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharavapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharavapshĂ«ro|sharavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharavapnkshĂ«ro|gosharavapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharavapshĂ«ro|gokisharavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharavapshĂ«mu|sharavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharavapnkshĂ«mu|gosharavapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharavapshĂ«mu|gokisharavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharavapronĂŒ|sharavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharavapnkronĂŒ|gosharavapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharavapronĂŒ|gokisharavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharavaproshĂ«|sharavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharavapnkroshĂ«|gosharavapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharavaproshĂ«|gokisharavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharavapromu|sharavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharavapnkromu|gosharavapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharavapromu|gokisharavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharavapmunĂŒ|sharavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharavapnkmunĂŒ|gosharavapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharavapmunĂŒ|gokisharavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharavapmushĂ«|sharavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharavapnkmushĂ«|gosharavapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharavapmushĂ«|gokisharavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharavapmuro|sharavapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharavapnkmuro|gosharavapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharavapmuro|gokisharavapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
